title: Find the Largest CI Logs
stdout:
::fixture-ready::
$ find logs/ -type f -print
logs/unit.log
logs/integration.log
logs/build.log
logs/test.log
::exit-code::0
$ find logs/ -type f -printf '%s %p\n' | sort -nr | head -10
1200 logs/integration.log
130 logs/build.log
81 logs/test.log
6 logs/unit.log
::exit-code::0
